name: Champs Elysees
description:
You are in the Champs Elysees this place is very dark, because the branches
of the trees doesnt let the solar light pass. Here you see some squirrels
playing in the trees, and coleecting some nuts for the winter. The weater
is very cold, and wet, you are wishing you had brought your sweater. From
here you can go north, east, south, and west, for this reason you have lost
all sense of direction.
